title: HOZELOCK - Indoor Mixer Tap Connector : Fits Square, Round and Mixer Taps up to 43 mm High and 34 Mm Wide, Supplied with 2 Gaskets for a Better Seal [2274P9000], Nicht zutreffend
features: Designed to fit a wide variety of square, round and mixer taps
For taps up to 43mm high by 34mm wide
Made from the highest quality materials for a long leak free life
Provides a secure connection for your Hozelock System
description: From the manufacturer Mixer Tap Connector A versatile solution designed to fit a wide range of taps, including square, round, and mixer taps. Hozelock Mixer Tap Connector The Hozelock Mixer Tap Connector offers a quick and reliable way to link your tap to your watering system. Designed for fast, tool-free installation, simply fit and twist the connector onto your tap for a secure connection—no plumbing knowledge required. Compatible with a wide range of tap types, including round, square, and mixer taps up to 43mm high by 34mm wide, it’s suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. A choice of sealing washers ensures a watertight fit, preventing leaks and reducing water waste. Ideal for use with the Hozelock quick connect system, this connector allows you to effortlessly attach hoses, sprinklers, and other accessories, making garden watering simple and efficient. Key Benefits Include: Fits round or square taps up to 43mm high x 34mm wide for flexible indoor or outdoor use. Built from premium materials for a long-lasting, leak-free water connection you can rely on. Installs in seconds—just screw it on with no tools or plumbing skills needed. Includes multiple sealing washers to create a perfect watertight fit for different taps. Easily connects to Hozelock hoses, sprinklers, and accessories for seamless watering.
